name: Toffee-Peanut Bites
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F.
In a large bowl, beat together flour, butter or margarine, sugar, peanut butter, brown sugar, baking soda, vanilla, salt, and egg until well combined.
Using a wooden spoon, stir in the chopped Heath bars.
Form the dough into 3/4-inch balls and place them about 1 inch apart on ungreased cookie sheets. Press half of a peanut onto the top of each ball.
Bake for 10 minutes or until lightly browned. Remove from oven and let cool on wire racks. Store cooled cookies in an airtight container. Makes about 7 - 1/2 dozen cookies. Each cookie contains approximately 50 calories and 3 grams of fat.
